DP.192.0008:
The Dance Competition is ready to
get under way!\f
Can the backup dancers flawlessly
follow the main dancer’s steps?!\f
OK! Everybody, let’s dance!
Start the music!\f
DP.192.0018:
That’s it for the Dance Competition!\f
Leading in points right now is
[0103,0000]!\f
Can anyone turn things around in the
Acting Competition?\f
DP.192.0019:
Welcome! Thanks for joining our
practice Contest!\f
Feel free to practice all you want
and train for the big show!\f
I’ll be taking part to practice up
on being an MC!\f
DP.192.0020:
Looks like everyone’s here, so let’s
get on with our dance practice!\f
[0101,0000], you need to dance just
like the main dancer.\f
After dancing twice, the main dancer
switches with a backup dancer.\f
You get to be the main dancer last.
Do a dance that no one can imitate!\f
OK! Start it up!\f
